- [ ] New feature

## Testing

- [ ] I've bumped the `version` field in the YAML

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check backend/` passes
- [ ] `mypy backend/` passes (or I've explained why it can't)
- [ ] I've added a module docstring to new files
- [ ] I've used `from __future__ import annotations` at the top of new Python files
